privileged_info_summary: The task uses a 10-word synthetic English sentence 'The autonomous rover navigated the crater despite severe dust storms' with a linguistically well-formed Universal Dependencies v1 format dependency parse containing 9 relations. The root verb 'navigated' has a subject 'rover', direct object 'crater', and oblique argument 'storms'. All POS tags (DET, ADJ, NOUN, VERB, ADP) are valid UD universal tags. All dependency relations (det, amod, nsubj, dobj, case, compound, obl) are valid UD relations. The sentence is not from a standard NLP corpus—it is synthetic data created for this diagram visualization task. The dependency parse structure is semantically correct with proper noun phrase and prepositional phrase structure.
